# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID # Only run pipeline for merge requests

log_mr_details:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "--- Merge Request Details ---"
    - echo "Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "Description:"
    - echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "---------------------------"

update_release_notes:
  stage: build
  image: alpine/git:latest
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache bash # For multiline variable handling if needed
    - RELEASE_NOTES_FILE="release_notes.txt"
    - >
      echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE
      MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION
      Deployed at: $(date)" > $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
    - git config user.email "gitlab-ci@example.com"
    - git config user.name "GitLab CI"
    - git remote set-url origin "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git"
    - git add $RELEASE_NOTES_FILE
    - >
      COMMIT_SUBJECT="feat(release): Release notes for MR!$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID - $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - >
      COMMIT_BODY="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - git commit -m "$COMMIT_SUBJECT" -m "$COMMIT_BODY" || echo "No changes to commit."
    - git push origin "HEAD:$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME" || echo "Failed to push, possibly no changes or branch protected."
  rules:
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID
      when: manual # Commit might change source branch, manual trigger is safer.
      allow_failure: true # Pushing might fail if branch is protected or no changes.

deploy_and_tag:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine/git:latest
  script:
    - echo "Simulating deployment for MR $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID..."
    - >
      MR_TITLE_SLUG=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | sed -r 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9]+/-/g' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | head -c 50 | sed 's/^-*//g;s/-*$//g')
    - TAG_NAME="deploy-mr-$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA-$MR_TITLE_SLUG"
    - echo "Creating deployment tag: $TAG_NAME"
    - git config user.email "gitlab-ci@example.com"
    - git config user.name "GitLab CI"
    - git remote set-url origin "https://gitlab-ci-token:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git"
    - git tag -a "$TAG_NAME" -m "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" -m "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
    - git push origin "$TAG_NAME"
    - echo "Deployment complete and tag created."
  rules:
    - if: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID
      when: manual # Tagging production releases typically needs a manual step.
